vulnerablePopulations: patients with limited access to psychotherapy
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11: obsessions/compulsions causing distress/impairment; clinical assessment with comorbidity screening

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate due to limited ERP therapy access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Diagnosis concentrated in tertiary psychiatry; delays common
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: SSRIs + CBT/ERP where available; augmentation in specialist care
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High treatment gap for psychotherapy and stigma-driven delays
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Affordable generic SSRIs and expanding tele-mental health services
